zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Belknap於1428年5月出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Hamon Belknap33歲，母親Joan Boteler33歲。他於1463年之後與Margaret Knollys在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年6月20日享年60歲，埋葬在英國素可貝可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Belknap于1428年5月出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Hamon Belknap33岁，母亲Joan Boteler33岁。他于1463年之后与Margaret Knollys在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年6月20日享年60岁，埋葬在英国素可貝可利。

nameMeanings.name: Belknap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, the second element of which is most likely Middle English knappe ‘hilltop’. Compare Belnap .
History: Abraham Belknap (c. 1588–c. 1643) emigrated from Latton, Essex, England, to Lynn, MA, in the 1630s.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Belknap was born in May 1428, in Warwickshire, England, his father, Hamon Belknap, was 33 and his mother, Joan Boteler, was 33. He married Margaret Knollys after 1463, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 20 June 1488, at the age of 60, and was buried in Beckley, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Belknap est né en mai 1428, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamon Belknap, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Boteler, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Knollys après 1463, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1488, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Beckley, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Belknap im Mai 1428 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon Belknap 33 und seine Mutter Joan Boteler 33. Er hat nach 1463 in England Margaret Knollys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juni 1488 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in Beckley, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Belknap è nato il nel maggio 1428 nel Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Hamon Belknap, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Boteler, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Knollys dopo il 1463, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 giugno 1488, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Beckley, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Belknapが1428年5月にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hamon Belknapは33歳，母Joan Botelerは33歳であった。1463年以後にイギリスでMargaret Knollysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1488年6月20日に60歳で死去し，イギリススセックスベックリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Belknap(이)가 1428년 5월 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon Belknap(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Boteler(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1463년 이후 영국에서 Margaret Knollys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 6월 20일 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 벡리에 묻혔다.

mn.May 1428–20 June 1488: 1428 оны Тавдугаар сар–1488 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 20

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Belknap nasceu em maio de 1428, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamon Belknap, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Boteler, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Knollys após 1463, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1488, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Beckley, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Belknap родился май 1428 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamon Belknap было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Boteler, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Knollys после 1463 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 20 июня 1488 г. в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности беккли, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Belknap nació en mayo de 1428, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamon Belknap, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Boteler, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaret Knollys después de 1463, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de junio de 1488, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Beckley, Sussex, Inglaterra.
